capabilities.name: Budget approval gate
capabilities.verify: trust_level 'approve' on ad_optimize; ad_campaign_create approval-gated (draft until approved); PendingOperationsList.tsx

capabilities.name: Campaign optimization
capabilities.verify: ad_optimize skill (analyze/pause_underperformers/scale_winners/rebalance_budget) + get_attribution_report skill feeds real performance data (visits/leads/orders/revenue by campaign) into optimization decisions. GrowthDashboardPage shows KPIs; AttributionReportPage.tsx surfaces the best-performing campaigns view.

capabilities.name: UTM/attribution tracking
capabilities.verify: UTM columns on page_views/leads/orders + utm_attributions log table (anon INSERT, admin SELECT). captureUtmOnLanding() in src/lib/utm.ts stores first/last touch in localStorage; usePageViewTracker + track-page-view persist per-view UTMs and write a landing-touch attribution row. Lead creation (lead-utils.ts) attaches first/last UTMs + logs a conversion touch. utm_attribution_report RPC + AttributionReportPage.tsx render the campaign report.

capabilities.name: Organic social posting
capabilities.verify: social_posts table + schedule_social_post/list_social_posts/mark_social_post_posted skills; SocialPostsPage.tsx admin UI (draft/schedule/track). Daily cron social-post-scheduler flips past-due scheduled posts to failed with a 'no publisher' note. Marked PARTIAL because actual channel publish (LinkedIn/X/Meta) requires per-channel API credentials that are not wired — posts must be marked as posted manually or by an external integration.
